name: Solar Echoes: The Star Legation
short_description: Solar Echoes: The Star Legation is a choice-driven cinematic Sci-Fi Visual Novel game with RPG elements. Journey through space to gather and manage an alien crew, visit new worlds, negotiate with alien leaders, and even risk romance across the stars!
detailed_description:
The Star Legation is where the Solar Echoes universe begins.




The saga will continue in Star Fated, coming soon.


Wishlist now

ABOUT The Star Legation

Solar Echoes: The Star Legation is a Sci-Fi Visual Novel game with RPG elements, full of intriguing alien characters, bizarre foreign cultures, and interstellar conflict. Journey through space to gather and manage an alien crew, visit new worlds, negotiate with alien leaders, and even risk romance across the stars! Survival and success depends upon your choices and the reputation you've built among your alien crewmates. Can your diplomatic efforts with alien leaders lead to a peaceful alliance between all the races, or will you incite a massive interstellar war? Will your words bring unity, or chaos?

Build relationships with each of your alien crew on an adventure in space in this cinematic, choice-driven visual novel with RPG elements. Customize the skills of the protagonist, Trey Donovan, and make over 500 choices in this branching-path story with multiple, voice-acted endings that depend on the relationships you've built during your journey. Negotiate with powerful alien leaders to gain their trust, make crucial decisions as a starship commander, engage in choice-driven battles (optional), and pursue romance with either of 2 female human contacts.

Travel to new worlds and encounter bizarre alien creatures. Brave the dangers of space while managing a divided crew—some represent cultures that are actively at war with each other. Stand before powerful leaders and use diplomacy, persuasion, and cunning to unite them under the Interstellar Union.

But be careful, because many of your decisions influence your reputation with each crew member, the alien leaders, and your romantic interests. 3 main endings with 5 variations each depend on your choices and your reputation.

Can you unite all the alien races in an interstellar alliance? Will you win someone's heart along the way? Or will you meet with disaster by endangering your crew, yourself, or even doom an entire species? Use your chosen skills to find a path to success in this engaging and meaningful visual novel!

FEATURES

  • The Star Legation’s beautifully authentic style blends realism with a cel-shaded, anime touch. Design, art, and audio create a unique space-opera atmosphere.

  • 500+ decisions to make in this epic, choice-driven branching story where your decisions really matter!

  • Experience an engaging narrative filled with intrigue, humor, science, treachery, and heart.

  • RPG elements with 8 different character design skill choices to make

  • 32 possible endings (including 5 main endings)

  • Immersive and realistic dialogue: some character sprites have over 100 different expressions!

  • Optional Romance story routes with 2 human characters

  • Detailed background art, cinematic camera work, expressive character sprites, and animated sequences make this visual novel a dynamic experience!

  • Build relationships with memorable characters and develop reputations with each that will alter the course of the story!

  • 8-12 hours of gameplay, with additional hours in alternate routes and endings

  • Awesome SciFi soundtrack by composer Andy Mitchell, featuring over 90 minutes of original music!

  • 15+ High Res CG's to unlock, designed by the talented artist, Aeghite!

  • Hidden skill-related choices based on your character design that unlock extra routes and content

  • Kinetic Combat (auto-play/auto-win), or Challenge Mode

  • All 5 main endings each voice acted by 3 different voice actors
